items.name: mcp-chrome
items.description: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes your Chrome browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling complex browser automation, content analysis, and semantic search.

items.name: MCP-Server-Playwright
items.description: MCP server for browser automation using Playwright

items.name: puppeteer-mcp-server
items.description: This MCP server provides browser automation capabilities through Puppeteer, allowing interaction with both new browser instances and existing Chrome windows.

items.name: comet-mcp
items.description: MCP Server connecting to Perplexity Comet browser

items.name: ultimate_mcp_server
items.description: Comprehensive MCP server exposing dozens of capabilities to AI agents: multi-provider LLM delegation, browser automation, document processing, vector ops, and cognitive memory systems

items.name: openchrome
items.description: Open-source browser automation MCP server. Control your real Chrome from any AI agent.

items.name: blueprint-mcp
items.description: MCP server for browser automation across Chrome, Firefox, and Safari using real browser profiles

items.name: mcp-browser-use
items.description: FastAPI server implementing MCP protocol Browser automation via browser-use library.
